title: Strategic Management
shortDescription: We strengthen our group companies through clear strategy, strong governance, and disciplined capital allocation.
fullDescription:
We are an active holding company focused on value creation.
We strengthen our group companies through clear strategy, strong governance, and disciplined capital allocation, with the objective of delivering sustainable, risk-adjusted returns.
We set direction at group level, manage risk and compliance, enable shared capabilities, and drive operational discipline—allowing each subsidiary to remain operationally autonomous while benefiting from institutional-grade oversight and scale.

What we do

  • Align group strategy and priorities to maximize long-term value
  • Allocate capital to the highest-impact opportunities, with disciplined return expectations
  • Strengthen governance, risk management, and compliance across the group
  • Drive performance and operational synergies to improve efficiency and scalability
  • Build strategic partnerships that expand market access and growth potential

title: Research, Development & Innovation
shortDescription: We provide group-level Research, Development & Innovation (RDI) services to strengthen the competitiveness and long-term value of our portfolio companies.
fullDescription:
Scalable Advantage.
We provide group-level Research, Development & Innovation (RDI) services to strengthen the competitiveness and long-term value of our portfolio companies.
By centralising innovation strategy, applied research, and technology development, we reduce execution risk, accelerate time-to-market, and improve capital efficiency across the group.
Our approach allows subsidiaries to innovate faster—without duplicating cost—while retaining full ownership of their operational execution.

What we deliver

  • Strategic research & market intelligence to inform investment and product decisions
  • Product, service, and platform development aligned with group strategy
  • Technology and digital innovation to improve scalability and resilience
  • Process innovation and operational optimisation to enhance margins
  • Partnership-driven innovation, including academia, industry, and technology partners

title: Strategic & Innovation Consulting
shortDescription: Strategic and innovation consulting that transforms MSME sector strategies and ambition into investable platforms and measurable outcomes.
fullDescription:
For our Holding Companies, but also for Organisations, Institutions & Governments
MSME sector and platform ecosystem strategy — at national, regional, group, and global levels. Strategic and innovation consulting that transforms MSME sector strategies and ambition into investable platforms and measurable outcomes.
We support our holding companies, but also other organisations, financial institutions, and governments in designing and executing scalable MSME development strategies that connect policy, capital, innovations, and delivery.
Operating at the intersection of strategy, digital transformation, and development finance, we help stakeholders move from vision to execution—building MSME ecosystems that are bankable, scalable, and impact-driven.

What we deliver

  • MSME sector and platform ecosystem strategy at national, regional, group, and global level
  • Innovation-led business and operating models for MSME ecosystems
  • Design of MSME finance and risk-sharing mechanisms (blended finance, guarantees, platforms)
  • Digital and data-driven solutions for market access, formalisation, and funding readiness
  • Institutional strengthening and governance frameworks aligned with regulatory and investor expectations
  • Impact, ESG, and results measurement frameworks aligned with SDGs and development mandates

Value for decision-makers

  • Holding Companies: scalable MSME platforms, and ecosystems , capital readiness, and portfolio-level value creation
  • Institutions & Organisations: deployable programmes that crowd in private capital
  • Governments: policy-to-execution models delivering jobs, inclusion, and sustainable growth
